title: signed_document
description: Manifest emitted by the manual.pdf plugin for one or more customer-uploaded files (PDF, JPEG, PNG, GIF, TIFF, WebP, BMP) found in the catalog-resolved folder. Images are auto-converted to PDF and all files are merged into one PDF before signing. The merged PDF sidecars the envelope; this record carries only metadata.

file_present.description: True if at least one supported file was found in the expected folder.

file_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the merged PDF bytes when present (all source files combined).

file_size.description: Byte size of the merged PDF.

uploaded_at.description: Latest upload time across all source files in the folder.

in_temporal_window.description: True if the latest file upload time falls within [period_start, period_end + grace].

file_valid.description: True if all source files have supported types, convert successfully, and the merged PDF passes structural checks.

validation_failures.description: Human-readable list of failed checks. Each entry is prefixed with the failure code: unsupported_file_type, conversion_failed, merge_failed, file_too_small, missing_pdf_header, no_pages, or copy_paste_of_prior_period.

expected_uri.description: Resolved {scheme}://{bucket}/{prefix}/{evidence_id}/{period}/ folder URI where files are expected.

source_files.description: Per-file audit trail. Each entry records the original filename, file type, SHA-256 of the original bytes (before any conversion), upload time, and whether the file was converted from an image format.

filename.description: Base name of the original file as uploaded.

type.description: File type: pdf, jpeg, png, gif, tiff, webp, or bmp.

sha256.description: sha256:<hex> of the original file bytes before conversion.

uploaded_at.description: Upload timestamp for this specific file.

converted.description: True if this file was converted from an image format to PDF.
